summary: Iteration 198 Music Theory (Conservatory) module testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: /theory route loads MusicTheory page with 3 tabs (Circle of Fifths, Practice, Voice), 12 key nodes, 6 Solfeggio targets, Chladni canvas, mic toggles, and Play Reference button. Navigation contains Conservatory link under Sanctuary. Resolution nodule works without React hook errors.

minor.issue: Returns 500 - AttributeError in _get_user_gate_progress (pre-existing issue, not related to iteration 198)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 198 Music Theory (Conservatory) module fully working. (1) /theory route loads MusicTheory.js component with title 'The Conservatory'. (2) Three tabs: Circle of Fifths (data-testid='tab-theory'), Practice (data-testid='tab-practice'), Voice (data-testid='tab-voice'). (3) Circle of Fifths shows 12 key nodes (C, G, D, A, E, B, F#, Db, Ab, Eb, Bb, F) with data-testid='key-{key}'. (4) Practice tab shows 6 Solfeggio targets (432, 528, 639, 741, 852, 963 Hz) with data-testid='target-{hz}'. (5) Chladni canvas (data-testid='chladni-canvas') renders animated patterns. (6) Mic toggles: data-testid='mic-toggle' in Practice, data-testid='voice-mic-toggle' in Voice. (7) Play Reference button: data-testid='play-reference'. (8) Navigation: Conservatory link under Sanctuary category points to /theory. (9) Resolution nodule (data-testid='resolution-nodule') in profile dropdown works without React hook errors. (10) Note: GET /api/energy-gates/status returns 500 (pre-existing issue). (11) POST /api/moods/multi endpoint does not exist - use POST /api/moods with single mood.

resolution_nodule.react_hook_error: None - fixed by moving useResolution to component level
